steps.name: Given I am on the HOME page
When I clock in the timesheet with PIN "7518"
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('7', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('5', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('1', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('8', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title') }).locator('div.MuiDialogActions-root').getByRole('button', { name: 'CONFIRM', exact: true })
Then I should see the employee "Elena" in the employee list
Then I should see the "Ticket View" screen
And I should see the "Manicure" service
When I add the "Manicure" service to my cart
And I select the "GIFT CARD" category
And I add the "Shampoo" service to my cart
And I add the "Gift card $100" service to my cart
Then I should see a popup dialog with title "Activate Gift Card $100.00"
And I click on the "OK" button in the popup dialog
Then I should see the number card "2222" visible
When I click on the "ADD ON" button in the popup dialog
Then I should see the service "Gift card $100 (2222)" in my cart
And I should see my cart showing 3 item added
When I click on the total price of "Manicure"
When I click on the "PAY" button
Then I should see the text "PAYMENT TICKET" visible
And I click on the element with id "payment"
And I select the "Credit" payment type
And I fill the last 4 digits of card number "1234"
And I click on the element with id "payment"
Then I should be redirected to HOME page
Given I am on the CLOSE_OUT page
Then I should see the "Close Out" screen
When I search for "Elena" and select the result
Then I should see the header "Technician Report" in the bill render
And I should see the detail "Technician Name: Elena" in the bill render
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('.info-row').filter({ has: locator('.info-label').filter({ hasText: /^\s*Technician Name\s*:?\s*$/ }) })
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('.info-row').filter({ has: locator('.info-label').filter({ hasText: /^\s*Technician Name\s*:?\s*$/ }) }).locator('.info-value')
Expect "toContainText" locator('.info-row').filter({ has: locator('.info-label').filter({ hasText: /^\s*Technician Name\s*:?\s*$/ }) }).locator('.info-value')
And I should see the title "Item Sales Details"
And I should see the "Item Name" with value "Manicure Shampoo Gift card $100" in the sale row detail
And I should see the "QTY" with value "3" in the sale row detail
And I should see the "Tip" with value "$10.00" in the sale row detail
And I should see the "Amount" with value "$221.70" in the sale row detail
And I should see the title "Summary"
And I should see the summary detail "Gift Card Sale $100.00" in the bill render
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('.summary-row').filter({ has: locator('.summary-label').filter({ hasText: /^Gift Card Sale$/i }) })
Expect "toHaveText" locator('.summary-row').filter({ has: locator('.summary-label').filter({ hasText: /^Gift Card Sale$/i }) }).locator('.summary-value')
And I should see the summary detail "Service/Product Sale $121.70" in the bill render
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('.summary-row').filter({ has: locator('.summary-label').filter({ hasText: /^Service\/Product Sale$/i }) })
Expect "toHaveText" locator('.summary-row').filter({ has: locator('.summary-label').filter({ hasText: /^Service\/Product Sale$/i }) }).locator('.summary-value')
And I should see the summary detail "Net Total Sale $118.70" in the bill render
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('.summary-row').filter({ has: locator('.summary-label').filter({ hasText: /^Net Total Sale$/i }) })
Expect "toHaveText" locator('.summary-row').filter({ has: locator('.summary-label').filter({ hasText: /^Net Total Sale$/i }) }).locator('.summary-value')
And I should see the summary detail "Commission $46.22" in the bill render
And I should see the summary detail "Non-Cash Tip $10.00" in the bill render
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('.summary-row').filter({ has: locator('.summary-label').filter({ hasText: /^Non-Cash Tip$/i }) })
Expect "toHaveText" locator('.summary-row').filter({ has: locator('.summary-label').filter({ hasText: /^Non-Cash Tip$/i }) }).locator('.summary-value')
And I should see the summary detail "CASH RECEIVED $50.00" in the bill render
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('.summary-row').filter({ has: locator('.summary-label').filter({ hasText: /^CASH RECEIVED$/i }) })
Expect "toHaveText" locator('.summary-row').filter({ has: locator('.summary-label').filter({ hasText: /^CASH RECEIVED$/i }) }).locator('.summary-value')
And I should see the summary detail "CASH IN/OUT $0.00" in the bill render
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('.summary-row').filter({ has: locator('.summary-label').filter({ hasText: /^CASH IN\/OUT$/i }) })
Expect "toHaveText" locator('.summary-row').filter({ has: locator('.summary-label').filter({ hasText: /^CASH IN\/OUT$/i }) }).locator('.summary-value')
And I should see the summary detail "I OWE SALON $50.00" in the bill render
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('.summary-row').filter({ has: locator('.summary-label').filter({ hasText: /^I OWE SALON$/i }) })
Expect "toHaveText" locator('.summary-row').filter({ has: locator('.summary-label').filter({ hasText: /^I OWE SALON$/i }) }).locator('.summary-value')
Given I am on the CLOSED_TICKETS page
And I wait for the page fully loaded
Then I should see the first ticket of payment "$235.35"
